## Accessibility Improvement

**What accessibility aspect would you like to improve?**

**What type of accessibility improvement?**
- [ ] Screen reader support
- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Color contrast
- [ ] Alt text for images
- [ ] Focus indicators
- [ ] Semantic HTML
- [ ] ARIA labels
- [ ] Voice control support
- [ ] High contrast mode
- [ ] Font size options
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Where is this accessibility element located?**
- [ ] Header
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Content sections
- [ ] Forms
- [ ] Images
- [ ] Videos
- [ ] Interactive elements
- [ ] Tables
- [ ] Lists
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Current accessibility implementation**
Describe what's currently implemented for accessibility.

**Proposed improvement**
Describe what improvement you'd like to see.

**Accessibility testing tools used (if any)**
- [ ] axe DevTools
- [ ] WAVE
- [ ] Lighthouse
- [ ] NVDA
- [ ] JAWS
- [ ] VoiceOver
- [ ] TalkBack
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**WCAG guidelines**
Which WCAG guidelines does this improvement address?

**Impact on users**
How will this improvement benefit users with disabilities?

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (blocks users)
- [ ] High (significantly impacts users)
- [ ] Medium (moderate impact)
- [ ] Low (minor improvement)

**Testing approach**
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Automated testing
- [ ] User testing
- [ ] Expert review
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the accessibility improvement here.

**Note**: Accessibility improvements make the website usable for everyone!

**Note**: Accessibility is not just good practice, it's a legal requirement in many places!

**Note**: Test with real users and assistive technologies when possible!

**Note**: Accessibility benefits all users, not just those with disabilities!
